serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.description: Base URL of the Rust sync server.

authToken.label: Auth token
authToken.description: Bearer token required by the sync server.
authToken.authorizedDescription: Authorized with the current server token.
authToken.gateMissingToken: Enter a valid Auth token to unlock vault, sync scope, device and E2EE settings.
authToken.gateUnauthorized: The current Auth token was rejected by the server. Update the token and run Check again.
authToken.gateLocked: Authorize this plugin to unlock the rest of the sync settings.

deviceId.label: Device ID
deviceId.description: Stable identifier for this Obsidian installation.

pollInterval.label: Poll interval
pollInterval.description: How often the plugin polls the server for remote changes.

autoSync.label: Auto sync
autoSync.description: Run the sync loop in the background.

serverVaults.label: Server vaults
serverVaults.empty: No vaults exist on the server yet.
serverVaults.currentNotLoaded: Loaded {{count}} vault(s). The current vault is not in the server registry.
serverVaults.loadPrompt: Load vaults from the server to join an existing one.

createVault.label: Create vault
createVault.descriptionConnected: Create a new vault on the server and reconnect this folder to it.
createVault.descriptionDisconnected: Create a new vault on the server and connect this folder to it.

joinVault.reconnectDescription: Reconnect this folder to a vault discovered on the server.
joinVault.joinDescription: Connect this folder to a vault discovered on the server.

joinDecision.label: Initial sync strategy
joinDecision.description: You just connected {{vaultId}}. This directory already contains {{count}} local syncable file(s), and the server vault is not empty. Choose whether to accept the server vault as the source of truth and overwrite local files, or try a normal sync where conflicts may be created.
joinDecision.required: Connected to {{vaultId}}, but you need to choose a first-sync strategy for {{count}} local file(s) before syncing starts.
joinDecision.overwriting: Downloading {{vaultId}} from the server and overwriting local files...
joinDecision.overwriteComplete: Local syncable files were replaced with {{vaultId}} from the server.

state.disconnectPending: Click "Confirm disconnect" to leave {{vaultId}}. Pending work or sync issues may still exist locally.
state.disconnected: This folder is no longer connected to {{vaultId}}.
state.forgetPending: Click "Confirm forget" to remove local state for {{vaultId}}.
state.reconnected: This folder is reconnected to {{vaultId}} and E2EE is ready.
state.joined: This folder is connected to {{vaultId}} and E2EE is ready.

include.label: Include patterns
include.description: Optional allow-list. If set, only matching paths are synced. Same pattern syntax as ignore rules.

ignore.label: Ignore patterns
ignore.description: One pattern per line. Supports '*', '?', and folder prefixes ending with '/'.

helpers.e2eeLoadedPendingFingerprint: E2EE: passphrase loaded. A fingerprint will be saved after the first encrypted sync.
helpers.e2eeFingerprintMissingPassphrase: E2EE: fingerprint {{fingerprint}} is saved, but no passphrase is loaded in this session.
helpers.e2eeFingerprintLoaded: E2EE: fingerprint {{fingerprint}} is saved and the session passphrase is loaded.

validation.pendingFingerprint: No fingerprint stored yet. It will be recorded after the first encrypted sync.
validation.notConfigured: E2EE is not configured for this vault yet.
validation.passphraseRequired: E2EE passphrase is required for this vault
validation.passphraseLocked: E2EE passphrase is already set for this vault. Disconnect or forget local state before changing it.
validation.fingerprintMismatch: E2EE passphrase does not match the stored fingerprint for this vault

createVault.title: Create vault
createVault.intro: Enter a vault name and an E2EE passphrase for the new vault.
createVault.vaultNameDescription: Used as the server-side vault ID for this folder.
createVault.passphraseDescription: Required when creating a new vault.
createVault.confirmPassphraseDescription: Re-enter the passphrase to avoid creating the vault with a typo.

errors.enterPassphrase: Enter an E2EE passphrase to create this vault.

joinVault.title: Join vault
joinVault.intro: Enter the E2EE passphrase for the vault you are joining. If the vault already has encrypted content, the passphrase will be verified; otherwise join will continue without verification.
joinVault.passphraseDescription: Required when joining a vault with encrypted content.

errors.enterPassphrase: Enter an E2EE passphrase to join this vault.

fileHistory.title: Server history: {{path}}
fileHistory.empty: No server history is available for this file yet.

commands.restorePreviousVersion: Restore active file to previous server version

notices.activeFileNotTracked: The active file is not tracked by sync yet.
notices.noPreviousSyncedVersion: No previous synced server version is available for the active file.
notices.noPreviousServerVersion: No previous server version is available for this file.
notices.restoreConflict: Restore conflicted with a newer server version. Run sync and try again.
notices.connectVaultFirst: Connect this folder to a vault first

errors.unauthorizedDetailed: Unauthorized. Check Auth token in plugin settings.
errors.invalidVaultId: Vault ID is invalid. Use only letters, digits, '-' or '_'.
errors.invalidDeviceId: Device ID is invalid. Use only letters, digits, '-' or '_'.
errors.unauthorized: Auth failed. Check the token in plugin settings.
errors.fingerprintMismatch: E2EE passphrase does not match this vault.
errors.decryptRequired: E2EE passphrase is required to decrypt synced content
